children.heading: .—Availability of Amounts
children.label: a .—Availability of Amounts
children.text: Amounts equal to the amounts authorized under sections 48101–48105 of this title remain in the Airport and Airway Trust Fund established under section 9502 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 () until appropriated for the purposes of sections 48101–48105.26 U.S.C. 9502
Amounts in the Fund may be appropriated only to carry out a program or activity referred to in this chapter.
Amounts in the Fund may be appropriated for administrative expenses of the Department of Transportation or a component of the Department only to the extent authorized by .section 48104 of this title

children.heading: .—Limitation on Obligating or Expending Amounts
children.label: c .—Limitation on Obligating or Expending Amounts
children.text: In a fiscal year beginning after , the Secretary of Transportation may obligate or expend an amount appropriated out of the Fund under only if a law expressly amends section 48104.September 30, 1998section 48104 of this title
